response.justification: The candidate has strong long-tenured IC experience (14+ years) with relevant exposure to testing tooling, CI infrastructure, and developer education (Selenium courses, test runners, workshops). However, the resume shows no explicit people-management role, no formal team-leadership tenure with direct reports, and limited mobile-platform depth — all of which are core requirements for this Engineering Manager position focused on engineering productivity at a major mobile platform scale.
strengths: 14+ years of software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Demonstrated developer-tooling and testing infrastructure work (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, CI/GitLab setup, MCP code generators)
Teaching and mentoring track record via workshops, dojos, and multi-module Selenium course
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-report leadership experience listed
Limited mobile-platform ecosystem depth; iOS/Apple TV work is brief and dated (2015–2016)
Developer-tools experience is fragmented across side projects rather than a sustained 3+ year focused role
